data.summary: [LIVIN’ ON SWEETS! Update Notice] Sensei, the mini-game LIVIN’ ON SWEETS! has received an additional
data.body:
[LIVIN’ ON SWEETS! Update Notice]

Sensei, the mini-game LIVIN’ ON SWEETS! has received an additional update!

Enjoy the lingering excitement of the Serenade Promenade event by playing the newly added songs!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2851982
